name: 24"x16" Ceramic Assembled Table Lamp White - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Ribbed Design, Dimmable, UL Listed
description:
Create a cozy atmosphere whenever you switch on the Ceramic Assembled Table Lamp from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This lamp features a bright white hue with vertical rib detailing and a white drum shade for a clean look that is perfect for any decor scheme. The body is made from strong ceramic for a textured look you’ll love, and the light has dimmable settings so you can set the mood just right. Perfect on an end table, nightstand or accent table, this ceramic lamp is a must-have lighting piece for any room.

Meet Shea McGee, the designer and stylist behind the brand Studio McGee. Founded alongside her husband, Syd, the studio is known for Shea’s design of beautifully elevated spaces that encourage clients to surround themselves with the things and people they love. Now she’s partnering with Threshold to offer Studio McGee’s classic design in a new collection for inspired homes, everywhere.
